cases.case_name: PUNTO PEN single-bid capture at financial/military institutions
cases.source_news: ARIA T3 -- 55pct DA, 45pct SB, 448M at BANJERCITO via SB, 180M at CNBV, 101M at FONATUR
cases.notes: PUNTO PEN: massive SB contracts at BANJERCITO (448M), CNBV, FONATUR. 11 contracts, 734M total. Sector mismatch.

cases.source_news: ARIA T3 -- 93pct of 453M at CFE, SB=57.7pct, peak 220M in 2014
cases.notes: Trunked radio 93pct at CFE over 22 years. SB=57.7pct. Peaks 2010 (144M) and 2014 (220M). Also IMSS 22M 80pct SB.
